faqs.question: What pests are most common in Maspeth homes?
faqs.answer: Maspeth residents most frequently deal with German cockroaches, mice, pavement ants, and seasonal invaders like cluster flies and stink bugs. Homes near Newtown Creek or industrial areas may also experience higher rodent activity due to proximity to warehouses and commercial properties.
